title: Shattered World Limits
description: mod extends the height and depth vanilla limitations. Always wanted to build beyond the 256, 320, or 512 height marker? ... well now you can go 1024 blocks up. What about going deep below the bedrock barrier? Introducing Shattered World Limits
body: extends the height and depth vanilla limitations. Always wanted to build beyond the 256, 320, or 512 height marker? ... well now you can go 1024 blocks up. What about going deep below the bedrock barrier? Introducing Shattered World Limits Mod, an exciting new addition to your favorite game that takes you deeper than ever before. With this mod, you'll be able to explore the depths of the earth, venturing all the way down to Y-512, where you'll find a whole new world of caves and with all the underground features. The mod adds a variety of new cave systems, including winding tunnels, vast caverns, and underground rivers, all of which are filled with exotic plants and creatures. Whether you're a seasoned spelunker or a first-time explorer, the Shattered World Limits Mod will make your gaming experience more exciting and engaging than exer before. So, grab your pickaxe and get ready to discover the hidden wonders of Minecraft's underground world!
